title: TDM
description: Text and Data Mining reservation metadata for AI content usage rights.

@context.description: The JSON-LD Context URI for ISCC metadata.

$schema.description: The JSON Schema URI for TDM service metadata.

train.description: Reservation status for AI model training. Covers pre-training, fine-tuning, RLHF, distillation, and embedding training.

inference.description: Reservation status for inference-time content retrieval. Covers RAG, grounding, fact-checking, and context augmentation.

derive.description: Reservation status for AI-generated derivative works. Covers summarization, translation, format adaptation, and content reformulation.

search.description: Reservation status for search and discovery indexing. Covers content indexing with title, snippet, and source attribution.

analyze.description: Reservation status for automated content analysis. Covers classification, sentiment analysis, topic modeling, and metadata extraction.
